programmes.show_description: The Beast Of Andros Island. The team probe reports of a sea monster said to be attacking Bahamian locals. Their hunt, deep into 'blue holes' could expose shocking military secrets. S3, Ep12
Death Island. Josh Gates sends the team to reportedly the most haunted place in America: Mackinac Island. This remote island has experienced over 1,000 years of bloodshed. S4, Ep1

Teleshopping.

Teleshopping.
Blow Up. The baggage battlers head to an unclaimed crate auction Tucson, Arizona and things really heat up when one of the experts tests a vintage bomb detonator. S3, Ep4
Mike Tyson's Punch Out. The baggage battlers head to an estate auction in Jacksonville, Florida, where pop culture collectibles and sealed boxes are amongst the items on offer. S3, Ep5
Uncharted Waters. As the new summer mining season begins, gold in Nome is drying up, pushing miners to extreme new locations in a desperate search for gold. S6, Ep1
Cruel Summer. The miners of Nome continue their search for new gold. Whilst Zeke and Emily head to Sledge Island, Shawn continues his dreams of gold at the Bluff. S6, Ep2
The Gold Gypsies' tenacity is rewarded with their biggest nugget of the season. Meanwhile, Jake's new plan to save the Dirt Dogs' season turns into a disaster. S4, Ep10
Florida Black Panther. Forrest combs the Florida Everglades for the black panther, which has never been seen in the US. Discoveries in the area suggest it may be more than a rumour. S1, Ep3
Graduation Day. The season closes with a fierce storm, a great prank on the Northwestern by the crew of the Time Bandit and the departure of one of the fleet's most valued fishermen. S7, Ep8
Sea Change. Massive change strikes every returning boat as Opilio Season begins. Edgar finally says goodbye to the Northwestern and a new captain boards the Cornelia Marie. S7, Ep9
Ghosts from the Past. In a journey that divides their resources and opinions, Adam and Evan take to the perilous glacier country. Meanwhile, Daryl heads to San Francisco. S1, Ep3
The Lost Colony Of Roanoke. Josh Gates joins leading archaeologists as they investigate America's first missing-persons case, The Lost Colony of Roanoke. S3, Ep4
Cloning The Woolly Mammoth. To help clone the extinct woolly mammoth back to life, Josh visits a biotech lab driving the project and excavates ancient bones in a Canadian mine. S3, Ep5
Burned Out. The Raneys give a masterclass on rebuilding from scratch when they come to the aid of a family whose homestead was completely destroyed in a devastating wildfire. S3, Ep9
Idaho Death Trap. The Jackson family suffer from a cabin on the verge of collapse and predators threatening their 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin liveable. S3, Ep10
Start Again From The Beginning. Gale force winds threaten the Digi Diggers' dreams of an eco-mine. The Bushmen discover dangerous old workings while clearing out their new mine. S6, Ep6
Hit Or Miss. The Mooka Boys may lose a potential investor due to their little mining progress. Disaster strikes for the Opal Whisperers when Sofia's hoist fails. S6, Ep7
Hail Mary Full Of Crab. A massive leak fills the Time Bandit. A fistfight tests Jake's resolve while heavy winds and a snapped anchor threaten to wreck his boat. S13, Ep6
Poisoned At Sea. A big decision weighs on Sig Hansen. Rookie captain Sean Dwyer gambles on a new venture with a new crew. Meanwhile, Jake struggles to replace a lost anchor. S13, Ep7
My Baby's Face Tumor. A 16-month-old toddler undergoes surgery to remove a life-threatening facial tumour. Plus, a girl has an operation on her skull to allow her brain to grow. S5, Ep9
World's Tiniest Brothers. Two feet tall brothers were hidden from the world for years because they were considered cursed. Plus, a boy's brain tumour causes violent seizures. S5, Ep10
Permit delays ruin the Poseidon Crew's hopes of a massive payday on their famed ground. A torrential downpour forces Shane and Russell to evacuate their dig site. S7, Ep11
Crossbow And A Cross To Bear. Desperate for food, Gwen and Sarah lead the charge to build a crossbow in the bush while Ryan feels the pressure. And, a fire pushes Bulent to the edge. S5, Ep10
Strength In Pain. An adventuress teams up with a wilderness instructor to take on the tropical rainforests of Honduras. But will they survive a close encounter with a deadly snake? S2, Ep28

Trenton Central High School. The team take on a huge high school in Trenton, New Jersey. Key items include fireclay sinks and oak cabinets. Plus, Mike and Tay build an N-shaped desk. S5, Ep5
Portside Marina. The guys save the bow and stern of a boat on Smith Mountain Lake in Moneta, Virginia. And, new team members Molly May and Stella make their debut. S5, Ep6
Hail Mary. Desperate to find new gold, Shawn pushes himself and his equipment to the limit. At Sledge Island, the deeper water triggers dangerous side effects for Zeke. S6, Ep3
Proving Day. Shawn's obsession with the bluff hits breaking point. Zeke and Emily take a last trip to Sledge Island, and novice George Young seeks riches on the Bering Sea floor. S6, Ep4
Scrappers boss Alex Stead gambles his remaining cash on bigger machinery, pushing his marriage to the edge. And, the Victoria Diggers unearth a rare artefact. S4, Ep11
The Great Auk. Forrest is in the Faroe Islands looking for a trace of the great auk, a large flightless seabird that was declared extinct over 175 years ago. S1, Ep5
Frontier Medicine. Ice and injuries have the captains considering desperate measures as the fleet battles for survival in the face of an epic arctic hurricane. S7, Ep10
Birds, Bones And Blood. As winter storms rip through the crab grounds, the Ramblin' Rose takes a big risk and the Time Bandit courts danger at the dock. S7, Ep11
Weathering the Storm. Deep in the mountains of British Columbia, there's a legend - a fortune in gold guarded by a dangerous curse. Now, six adventurers return to go for gold. S1, Ep4
Journey To The Ice Age. Josh treks deep into Siberia for a site where priceless mammoth bones are mined out of the permafrost. Then, he takes the DNA samples back to the lab. S3, Ep6
Cracking The D.B. Cooper Case. Josh Gates sets off on an expedition to crack the mystery behind the perpetrator of the only unsolved plane hijacking in US history. S3, Ep7
Arizona Washout. A daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead is threatened by deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar. S3, Ep11
Smoky Mountain Fury. In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. They race to shore up key structures before the next big storm. S3, Ep12
Succession Of Opal Joe. The Blacklighters discover opalised sea creatures in an ancient seabed. The Cheals close in on their biggest opal haul ever, but all is not as it seems. S6, Ep8
A Glimmer Of Hope. The Mooka Boys attempt to reach a new mine on a treacherous opal field. Plus, the Blacklighters are almost buried alive mining opal in unstable tunnels. S6, Ep9
40-Foot Monsters. As fall season ends, its biggest storm hits. Wild Bill fights to pilot his new boat in big seas and Johnathan tackles a huge swell in the perilous False Pass. S13, Ep8
The Russian Line. Competition doubles when the quota is halved. Three captains arrive early for the winter season, but Johnathan plots a dangerous, 600-mile course to Russia. S13, Ep9
Jack Knows Best. When the Black Pearl's trommel motor catches fire, Todd's crew attempts to modify the smaller wash plant Jack built decades ago to run more pay dirt. S2, Ep10
Under The Gun. Sig devises a way to speed up his crew. Wild Bill promotes Landon to the wheelhouse while he goes under the knife. Keith helps Jack but is suspicious. S20, Ep10
Jacqui and Andrew are targeted by potential gold thieves. Marcus and Linden hunt ground close to the site of the biggest nugget ever found in Western Australia. S7, Ep12
